title: The Nag Hammadi Library in English

description.en: James M. Robinson's edited translation (3rd rev. ed. 1988) of the 1945 Nag Hammadi Coptic codices — the principal primary-source corpus of Gnostic Christianity, including the Hypostasis of the Archons, On the Origin of the World, and the Apocryphon of John that preserve Ophite-adjacent readings of the Eden Serpent and the demiurge.
